generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the permanent magnet synchronous motor for position measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPosition
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind the gearbox for position measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderPosition
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current I_M of the motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorCurrent
]

instance CurrentSensorCurrent : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoderPosition : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPosition : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance AngularVelocity : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance Torque : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance IMeasurementData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current I_M data from motor current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorCurrent
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPosition
]

instance SecondaryPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderPosition
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from motor encoder position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocity
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque calculated from input current I_M measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData Torque
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque output from friction models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueData
]

instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for MBSE structural modeling of the robot axis components"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for friction model simulation and identification"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance MQTTDataStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for asset metadata management"
    DTDFVocab:enables AASMetadataService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for integrated monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Structural analysis using SysML BDD and IBD models"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelInsight
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction models using white-box and black-box approaches"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization of friction models and system performance in a unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adjustment of robot control algorithms based on friction model refinement for improved motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterUpdateAction
]

instance AASMetadataService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Management of asset metadata using Asset Administration Shells"
    DTDFVocab:provides AASMetadataInsight
]

instance StructuralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural model insights for robot axis components"
]

instance FrictionModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model identification results used to adjust control parameters"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of system performance and friction models"
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Parameter updates for control systems to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AASMetadataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Metadata information about the robot axis components"
]

instance SysMLBDDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for component interconnections"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction simulation model in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction simulation model in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction simulation model in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction simulation model in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance AASMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for robot axis metadata"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance PMMSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor providing torque τ_M as output"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission providing torque τ_G as output"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox providing torque τ_out as output"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller accepting position, speed, or acceleration inputs for robot control"
]

instance MABIMAX100RobotFirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor, PMMSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGearbox, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController, SysMLBDDModel, SysMLIBDModel, CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel, AASMetadataModel, IMeasurementData, MotorPositionData, SecondaryPositionData, AngularVelocityData, TorqueData, SimulatedTorqueData, StructuralModelInsight, FrictionModelInsight, VisualizationInsight, ParameterUpdateAction, AASMetadataInsight, SysMLModelingEnabler, SimulinkSimulationEnabler, MQTTDataStreamingEnabler, AASEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler, StructuralModelingService, FrictionModelIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService, AASMetadataService
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing with live measurements streamed via MQTT, enabling immediate synchronization between physical system state and digital representation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical robot (with motor, gearboxes, encoders), MQTT-streamed sensor data, AAS metadata, Simulink-based processing components, and dashboard visualization for unified friction model analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As-operated phase, utilizing live operational data from the physical robot during active machining tasks to model friction dynamics."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data (from friction models) against reference measurements to quantify deviation and refine model accuracy, focusing on multi-physics-aware friction identification."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data transmission from physical sensors to digital shadow, with Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for standardized asset metadata exchange."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for Industrie 4.0 asset interoperability, SysML for model-based systems engineering, and MQTT for messaging standardization."
]
